intentSynonyms: get a section content in wikipedia
look up a section content in wikipedia
fetch a single section content in wikipedia
view one specific section content in wikipedia
read a specific section of an article in wikipedia
description: Get the plain text content of a specific section of a Wikipedia article. Use get_article_sections first to find section indexes. Section 0 returns the article introduction.

section.description: Section index (0 for intro, use get_article_sections to find other indexes)
